reviews.review_msg: This  professor is currently at the University of Texas at San Antonio.  The material is too broad.  The reading assignments are 30 plus pages long, and you never know what to study for because he doesn't specify well enough.  No clarity in his speech, making it very difficult to understand him.  Khan done not have it together-steer clear of him!

Prof Khan is a genuinely nice person. He is also very accommodating and is willing to listen to the opinions of his students. Lectures are interesting and notes are helpful. However, he sometimes goes off topic and talks about India. haha! I highly recommend people to take his classes!

Shamshad is one of the best lecturers I have seen in the communications department. He is very knwoledgeable and really cares about your learning. He always comes to classes well prepared and encourages discussion. I am really enjoying this course and his teachings.
